subject: discounting of gri on one-part contracts

emails.subject: RE: Discounting of GRI on One-part Contracts
emails.subject_base: Discounting of GRI on One-part Contracts
emails.body: RE: Discounting of GRI on One-part Contracts Elizabeth, Yes I would like to discuss this with you. My schedule for Wednesday afternoon or Thursday looks good. How about you? Kim. To: Buchanan, John; Watson, Kimberly

emails.subject: RE: Discounting of GRI on One-part Contracts
emails.subject_base: Discounting of GRI on One-part Contracts
emails.body: Sorry for the delay in response...I'm up to my ears in preparation for TW's new contracts/capacity release implementation. I am available both Wednesday and Thursday afternoon. Please let me know which is better for you. Thanks, Elizabeth To: Brown, Elizabeth

emails.subject: RE: Discounting of GRI on One-part Contracts
emails.subject_base: Discounting of GRI on One-part Contracts
emails.body: How about today (Thursday) at 2:00. Can you come to EB1336?. John, are you available, also? Thanks, Kim. To: Watson, Kimberly

emails.subject: RE: Discounting of GRI on One-part Contracts
emails.subject_base: Discounting of GRI on One-part Contracts
emails.body: Can we move it back to 3pm...someone just scheduled another meeting for our upcoming implementation.

emails.subject: RE: Discounting of GRI on One-part Contracts
emails.subject_base: Discounting of GRI on One-part Contracts
emails.body: I have a conference call then. How about Friday morning or afternoon?

emails.subject: RE: Discounting of GRI on One-part Contracts
emails.subject_base: Discounting of GRI on One-part Contracts
emails.body: can we shoot for Friday at 9am?

emails.subject: RE: Discounting of GRI on One-part Contracts
emails.subject_base: Discounting of GRI on One-part Contracts
emails.body: Friday at 9:00am works for me. Where? Kim.
